notes: Teton Crest thru-line. Mileages are standard published Crest guide figures (est); gains DEM v2.4; zone coords approximate. DEM line method proved invalid in this terrain (lines cross 11,000 ft peaks between canyons); gains use pass_arithmetic_v1 and edges are dem_exempt. Mileages adopted from OSM-measured trail geometry 2026-07-13; the original guide-recall figures ran up to 2.7 mi short.

edges.src: Crest guides: Death Canyon TH to Marion below Fox Creek Pass; gains from zone and pass elevations (canyon climb, zone elevation arithmetic); DEM line-sampling invalid here, straight lines cross Teton peaks; miles corrected to OSM-measured 11.63 (guide recall said 8.9)

Crest guides: over Fox Creek Pass onto the Shelf; gains from zone and pass elevations (Fox Creek Pass 9,560); DEM line-sampling invalid here, straight lines cross Teton peaks; miles corrected to OSM-measured 3.98 (guide recall said 2.9)

Crest guides: Mount Meek Pass and the Sheep Steps; gains from zone and pass elevations (Mount Meek Pass 9,726 and the Sheep Steps); DEM line-sampling invalid here, straight lines cross Teton peaks; miles corrected to OSM-measured 4.97 (guide recall said 3.4)

Crest guides: Sunset Lake and Hurricane Pass; gains from zone and pass elevations (Hurricane Pass 10,372); DEM line-sampling invalid here, straight lines cross Teton peaks; miles corrected to OSM-measured 4.09 (guide recall said 5.6)

Crest guides: the Cascade forks; gains from zone and pass elevations (gentle forks section); DEM line-sampling invalid here, straight lines cross Teton peaks; miles corrected to OSM-measured 3.33 (guide recall said 2.7)

Crest guides: Paintbrush Divide; gains from zone and pass elevations (Paintbrush Divide 10,720); DEM line-sampling invalid here, straight lines cross Teton peaks; miles corrected to OSM-measured 7.22 (guide recall said 5.6)

Crest guides: Paintbrush Canyon out; gains from zone and pass elevations (Paintbrush Canyon descent); DEM line-sampling invalid here, straight lines cross Teton peaks; miles corrected to OSM-measured 6.41 (guide recall said 6.2)
